response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable Staff Engineer with solid fintech and backend experience, including recent work on AI-agent tooling at Stripe. However, he fundamentally lacks the executive leadership background required for a CTO role. There is no evidence in his resume of scaling engineering organizations, managing external delivery partners, or directing company-wide AI strategy and board-level communication.
strengths: Solid fintech and e-commerce background from tier-1 companies like Stripe and Shopify.
Extensive backend experience with high-throughput microservices and distributed systems.
Recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
concerns: Completely lacks executive-level engineering leadership and board communication experience.
No track record of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people or managing managers.
AI experience appears limited to developer tooling rather than architecting applied financial multi-agent systems.
